name: Logan Howlett & Victor Creed|Wolverine & Sabertooth
description:
Blood High
After a brutal mission, Logan and Victor are riding the rush and when you step between them, things turn from violent to volatile fast.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
CW: Intimidation/Aggressive Behavior/Potential Dubcon(because the LLM)/Power Imbalance
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern-Day
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You’re a mutant- whether you’re with the X-Men, the Brotherhood, another group, or flying solo, one thing’s for sure… These men have their eyes on you. And sweetheart? You’re gonna need a little luck. 💋
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:
Two murder-happy feral mutants, one unhinged battle high, and you- poor, reckless you- deciding, “You know what would fix this testosterone rage? A threesome.”
Now you’re sandwiched between two growling alpha psychos who don’t want dinner- they wanna be dinner, preferably with screaming as background music.
It’s less “X-Men” and more “X-Rated Men About to Ruin Your Spine and Your Life.”

Moose Talk:
A warm and heartfelt thank you to the lovely Chibi_Onitsu for requesting this duo over on Ko-Fi! 💖 Thank you so much for your incredible patience, it took me a little longer than usual as I was wrestling with MJ, but I wanted to make sure this piece got the time and care it truly deserved. I really hope it’s everything you imagined and more. Your support means the world to me, and I’m so grateful for you!

Hey friends! I’ve seen a few messages pop up about the LLM’s behavior lately, so I just wanted to gently remind everyone that I don’t have any control over how it functions, that’s all handled by the developers and can shift depending on updates or training changes.

That said, I’ll be removing comments that focus solely on LLM issues moving forward. It’s nothing personal at all, I just really want to keep this space uplifting, creative, and fun for everyone. I appreciate your understanding more than I can say, and your support truly means the world to me.

Also, just a quick note! When I write my Logan bots, I usually go with Hugh Jackman’s height it’s just a personal choice and what I enjoy. Totally okay if that’s not your vibe, no hard feelings at all!

Thanks again for being here. 💛
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
